title: Grocery-Anchored Retail Centers Continue to Outperform
summary: Grocery-anchored retail centers posted the highest occupancy rates and strongest rent growth among all retail property types in the first quarter, according to new NAIOP research. The format's resilience is attracting institutional capital, with several major funds increasing allocations to necessity-based retail. Investors cite stable foot traffic and low tenant turnover as key drivers of the format's outperformance.
